---
title: "Arlington Loop (28% Gravel)"
---


<a href="https://www.strava.com/activities/18162634293" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-strava"></i> Example Strava effort
</a>

```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="14.89" data-elevation="1921.92" data-time="106" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.89</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1921.92 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.14 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>7.40</td>
      <td>50.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.87</td>
      <td>19.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>2.01</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.29</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.18</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.14</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}
<<<<<<< HEAD
=======

>>>>>>> de17f9223efdd740c55d9891e15e6bda41d4390c
### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,277</td>
      <td>4.6</td>
      <td>47 ± 23</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Arlington Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>60</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Arlington Boulevard (7% avg)</td>
      <td>229</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Arlington Boulevard (9% avg)</td>
      <td>284</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>304</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>322</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>15 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Wildcat Creek Trail (2% avg)</td>
      <td>79</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,277</td>
      <td>14.9</td>
      <td>106 ± 42</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Arlington Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>60</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Arlington Boulevard (7% avg)</td>
      <td>229</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Arlington Boulevard (9% avg)</td>
      <td>284</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>8 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.3</td>
      <td>19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>304</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>322</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>15 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Wildcat Creek Trail (2% avg)</td>
      <td>79</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>16</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>28.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>28.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>19.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>9.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
